features.name: default_nettype none with module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a `default_nettype none directive followed by module instantiation where the instantiated module uses signals that would be implicitly declared

features.name: case equality operator with high-impedance literal
features.description: Code should include the case equality operator (=== or !==) used with a high-impedance literal (1'bz) in a conditional expression

features.name: conditional expression with high-impedance comparison in implicit net context
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional expression that compares a signal against 1'bz using case equality, where the signals are implicitly declared due to default_nettype none
